_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Provide input for the development of Cyber Effects Operations plans and targeting requirements.
reference_document_element_description: Ability to evaluate the regulatory implications of proposed data processing activities, AI system deployments, or business model changes, providing compliance risk assessment before implementation.
comments: DCWF task intersects with WIDAI RC domain. RC-A-005 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: OP-T-001 (OP, cosine: 0.476), RC-T-008 (RC, cosine: 0.467).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 3.9/10 (raw 0.387). No substantive shared vocabulary — relationship is purely semantic. DCWF-only terms [cyber, development, effects, input, operations, plans] vs WIDAI-only terms [ability, activities, ai, assessment, business, changes] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.867 (P=0.876, R=0.858). Balanced P/R — the 13-word DCWF element and 24-word WIDAI KSA cover each other's token-level semantic content symmetrically.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (99.8%). "Provide input for the development of Cyber Effects Operations plans and targetin" and "Ability to evaluate the regulatory implications of proposed data processing acti" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.504 > STS 0.387 (gap +0.117). Independent encoding finds more similarity than cross-attention. Shared surface terms [none] inflate the bi-encoder, but cross-attention detects semantic divergence beneath the vocabulary overlap.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 5.7%. Zero substantive shared tokens. The entire relationship is semantic — no lexical trace. DCWF terms: [cyber, development, effects, input, operations, plans]. WIDAI terms: [ability, activities, ai, assessment, business, changes].
